title: Improve Navbar logo/wordmark visual design and layout

requirements.text: Redesign the 'RK Industrial Park' logo/wordmark area in frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx for stronger visual impact and hierarchy. Currently the brand name wraps awkwardly across two lines ('RK INDUSTRIAL' / 'PARK'). Fix it to display on a single line without wrapping. Increase the font size and weight of the wordmark, apply a consistent typographic treatment (e.g., 'RK INDUSTRIAL PARK' in bold Inter with tracked uppercase lettering), ensure 'RK' or the full name uses the industrial blue accent (#1D4ED8) or a contrasting white/blue split to create visual hierarchy. The icon/logo mark to the left should be properly sized and vertically aligned with the wordmark. The result should feel like a confident, institutional brand lockup — not a wrapped overflow.

quotes: this title header can be made better

acceptanceCriteria: The 'RK Industrial Park' brand name in the navbar displays on a single line with no text wrapping
The wordmark uses bold, tracked uppercase typography consistent with the Inter design system
The logo icon and wordmark are vertically centred and visually balanced
A colour or weight contrast is applied between 'RK' and 'INDUSTRIAL PARK' (or the full name uses a unified strong treatment) to create brand hierarchy
The navbar brand lockup does not overflow or clip on desktop viewports
On mobile, the brand name remains legible and fits within the hamburger-menu collapsed navbar header

constraints: Do not modify any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths
Preserve all existing navbar navigation links and 'Book Site Visit' CTA button behaviour
Maintain the sticky/fixed navbar scroll behaviour
nonGoals: Redesigning the full navbar layout or navigation link styling
Changing the mobile hamburger menu implementation
Modifying any section components other than Navbar.tsx
